errors.RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Rate limit exceeded. Please try again later.
errors.DRAFT_ALREADY_SENT: This draft has already been sent

summaries.brief_template: Summarize the following WhatsApp conversation in 2-3 sentences. Include key topics, decisions made, and action items.
summaries.detailed_template:
Provide a comprehensive summary of this WhatsApp conversation. Include:
- Main topics discussed
- Key decisions and outcomes
- Action items with assignees
- Important dates or deadlines
- Tone and sentiment
